phase.name: Grill-me + auto-mode embeddings across ev-loop / archive / ev-run

contract.goal: Add the grill-me + auto-mode pattern to skills/ev-run/SKILL.md per PLAN.md Phase 6. 3 ambiguity classes (ambiguous redirect, manifest-vs-git drift, ambiguous next-phase) get reshaped into grill-me walks. Auto-mode resolves via evaluator-contract-fit reading: redirect → open PRs; drift → expected manifest; candidate phase → PLAN.md descriptions + last-decided direction. Silent-OR-budget(3 × 3). On budget exhaust, router DECLINES to dispatch (matches /ev-loop-interactive's blocking posture — unresolved ambiguity is too risky to dispatch through).
acceptance_criteria: Frontmatter argument-hint adds [--mode=auto]; allowed-tools widened to include Bash + AskUserQuestion.
Step 2's ambiguous-redirect table row references grill-me + auto-mode (instead of 'ask one clarifying question').
New § Grill-me + auto-mode section between § 5 Report and § Rules with 3 ambiguity classes, concrete examples, and per-class auto-mode resolution mechanism.
Budget exhaust: router declines to dispatch (matches ev-loop's blocking posture; documented contrast).
Human-paired mode emits no auto-mode events.

actions: Updated frontmatter: argument-hint to '<project-slug-or-path> [<free-form message>] [--mode=auto]'; allowed-tools widened from 'Read, Skill' to 'Read, Skill, Bash, AskUserQuestion' (Bash for bin/loom drift detection in auto-mode; AskUserQuestion for human-paired grill-me).
Updated step 2's table row for 'ambiguous': references grill-me-first (recommended interpretation) and the new § Grill-me + auto-mode section for auto-mode resolution.

Added § Grill-me + auto-mode section (~50 lines) between § 5 Report and § Rules. Three numbered classes: (1) Ambiguous redirect with example 'look at #14' → evaluator-contract-fit reads against events.jsonl open-PR trail; (2) Manifest-vs-git drift with example 'phase shows in-progress but branch merged' → evaluator-contract-fit reads against LOOM-CONVENTIONS phase lifecycle + actual git state; (3) Ambiguous next-phase with example 'two unblocked phases' → evaluator-contract-fit reads against PLAN.md descriptions + last checkin's notes_for_pr.
Cited substrate 3 × 3 default per AGENT-CONVENTIONS. Convergence: silent panel (evaluator approves single high-confidence resolution) OR budget exhaust.

Budget exhaust posture: router DECLINES to dispatch, surfaces unresolved to operator with structured error, stops. Explicitly contrasted with /ev-loop-interactive's blocking posture and noted same shape (unresolved ambiguity too risky to dispatch through).
Added 3 D1 event emissions with surface='ev-run' + the standard detail shapes. Closing note: human-paired mode emits no auto-mode events.
Ran npm test: 485/485 passed. File grew from 210 → 271 lines.
Derived evaluator panel (contract-fit). Invoked /guild-validate. Verdict: approved on round 1.

changes_since_previous: Fourth and final unit on this branch. D1 declared 3 auto-mode types; D2 added grill-me + auto-mode to ev-loop (blocking posture); D3 added auto-mode to /loom-archive (best-effort, non-blocking posture); D4 adds it to /ev-run (blocking posture, matching ev-loop). Three surfaces now consistently share the substrate's auto-mode primitive with surface-appropriate budgets and surface-appropriate exhaust postures.
notes_for_pr: Three-surface symmetry: ev-loop (3 × 5, blocks), loom-archive (3 × 8, best-effort), ev-run (3 × 3, blocks). The pattern is shared, the budgets and exhaust postures differ per surface's risk profile.

Two of the three /ev-run ambiguity classes (drift, next-phase) were previously implicit in the loop body — surfaced as 'stop and report the drift, let the user resolve' / 'list open blockers and stop' in the Failure modes section. The grill-me rewrite makes the auto-mode side of these decisions explicit; the human-paired side keeps the existing AskUserQuestion shape.

The third class (ambiguous redirect) was the only one already-documented as 'ask the user one clarifying question.' The grill-me rewrite makes this a structured AskUserQuestion with recommendation-first instead of a free-form prompt — matches the /draft-plan and /loom-research interview shapes.

Allowed-tools widened: Bash was needed because auto-mode invokes bin/loom (drift detection reads manifest) and bin/guild (derive-panel + parse-and-aggregate for evaluator-contract-fit). AskUserQuestion was needed for the human-paired grill-me path.
